blocks.body: Past Perfect Continuous: forma i użycie — had been + V-ing dla procesu, który trwał do innej czynności w przeszłości albo do tamtego momentu.

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"W Past Perfect Continuous używamy had been + V-ing, gdy chcemy pokazać czynność, która zaczęła się wcześniej i nadal trwała do innego wydarzenia w przeszłości albo do pewnego momentu w przeszłości.","rules":[{"label":"had been + V-ing","color":"emerald","text":"To podstawowa forma twierdząca dla wszystkich podmiotów.","example":"I had been working. / They had been waiting."},{"label":"Before another past event","color":"blue","text":"Ten czas pokazuje proces, który już trwał przed innym wydarzeniem w przeszłości.","example":"She had been studying before the exam started."},{"label":"Focus on duration","color":"amber","text":"Często ważne jest nie tylko to, że coś się działo, ale też jak długo trwał proces.","example":"We had been driving for three hours before we stopped."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowy wzór","intro":"Zapamiętaj, jak budujemy formę Past Perfect Continuous.","items":[{"label":"I / You / We / They","title":"had been + V-ing","subtitle":"I had been working. / They had been waiting."},{"label":"He / She / It","title":"had been + V-ing","subtitle":"She had been studying. / It had been raining."},{"label":"Spelling","title":"work → working, live → living, run → running","subtitle":"Po been użyj czasownika z końcówką -ing."},{"label":"Meaning","title":"process / duration before then","subtitle":"Czynność już trwała przed inną czynnością w przeszłości albo przed tamtym momentem."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy używamy Past Perfect Continuous","sections":[{"label":"Przed innym wydarzeniem","color":"emerald","description":"Pokaż proces, który trwał przed innym wydarzeniem w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"They had been waiting for an hour before the doors opened.","ua":"Czekanie już trwało przed kolejnym wydarzeniem."},{"en":"I had been reading when the lights went out.","ua":"Czytanie było procesem w tle."}]},{"label":"Do określonego momentu w przeszłości","color":"blue","description":"Mów o czasie trwania, który prowadził do konkretnego momentu w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"By 5 p.m., she had been working for six hours.","ua":"Długość trwania doszła do tego momentu w przeszłości."},{"en":"We had been driving since morning before we stopped.","ua":"Czynność trwała do tego późniejszego momentu."}]},{"label":"Przyczyna w przeszłości","color":"amber","description":"Ten czas często wyjaśnia stan albo rezultat w przeszłości przez wcześniejszy proces.","examples":[{"en":"He was tired because he had been running.","ua":"Wcześniejszy proces wyjaśnia późniejszy stan."},{"en":"Her eyes were red because she had been crying.","ua":"Rezultat w przeszłości wynika z wcześniejszego procesu."}]},{"label":"Tło w opowieści","color":"violet","description":"Ten czas pomaga zbudować tło przed inną czynnością w historii.","examples":[{"en":"They had been talking quietly before the teacher came in.","ua":"Ta czynność tworzy tło w opowieści."},{"en":"I had been looking for that file when my manager called.","ua":"Proces już trwał w tamtym momencie."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Szybkie sprawdzenie formy","intro":"Zobacz, jak had been łączy się z V-ing.","rows":[{"en":"I had been waiting for an hour before the train arrived.","ua":"had been waiting","note":"I + had been + V-ing"},{"en":"She had been studying all evening before the test.","ua":"had been studying","note":"she + had been + V-ing"},{"en":"They had been living there for years before they moved.","ua":"had been living","note":"they + had been + V-ing"},{"en":"The ground was wet because it had been raining.","ua":"had been raining","note":"had been + V-ing dla przyczyny w przeszłości"}],"warning":"Nie mów She had been work ani I had been waited. Po had been potrzebujesz V-ing."}

{"title":"4. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Past Perfect Continuous = had been + V-ing.","Forma had been jest taka sama dla wszystkich podmiotów.","Po had been użyj czasownika z -ing.","Ten czas podkreśla proces albo długość trwania przed inną czynnością w przeszłości albo przed tamtym momentem."]}

{"title":"Lekcje Past Perfect Continuous","items":[{"label":"Forma i użycie","url":"/pl/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-forms","current":true},{"label":"Przeczenia","url":"/pl/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-negatives","current":false},{"label":"Pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi","url":"/pl/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-questions","current":false},{"label":"Określenia czasu","url":"/pl/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-time-expressions","current":false}]}
